requirement_topic.en: Electrical Product Approval Path — SEC Marking Scope
requirement_topic.zh: 电器类产品准入路径——SEC标识范围
requirement_topic.zht: 電器類產品准入路徑——SEC標識範圍

summary.en: In Chile, SEC regulates electrical products and requires in-scope products to follow SEC approval and marking rules using authorized certifiers. The SEC seal is a market-access signal expected where electrical safety or related energy-safety scope applies.
summary.zh: 智利SEC负责电器类产品监管，并要求适用范围内产品按SEC许可与标识规则由具备授权的认证机构办理。符合SEC范围时，SEC印章属于市场准入的关键证明。
summary.zht: 智利SEC負責電器類產品監管，並要求適用範圍內產品按SEC許可與標識規則由具備授權的認證機構辦理。符合SEC範圍時，SEC印章屬於市場准入的關鍵證明。

standards_or_laws: SEC Chile official approval framework for electrical products
INN NCh standards ecosystem aligned to IEC references for product classes under SEC scope
Authorized certification body and mark-issuance requirements in SEC channels

summary.en: China-side requirements are framed through CCC where applicable and GB/GB T product safety standards. These are relevant technical inputs but are not accepted as a Chilean SEC market clearance substitute.
summary.zh: 中国侧要求以适用情形下CCC及GB/GBT标准为主。这些可作为技术输入，但不能替代智利SEC市场放行要求。
summary.zht: 中國側要求以適用情形下CCC及GB/GBT標準為主。這些可作為技術輸入，但不能替代智利SEC市場放行要求。

standards_or_laws: China Compulsory Certification (CCC) where required by product category
GB 31241 safety specification and related GB/GB T supporting standards
China factory, test report, and compliance documentation model for exports

gap.en: The exporter gap is that SEC scope clearance is treated as the Chile-specific admissibility gate, while China docs usually stop at Chinese conformity. Prepare SEC-facing documentation from the Chile importer side and do not treat CCC or GB/T reports as Chile approvals.
gap.zh: 差距在于SEC准入视为智利特定门槛，现有中国文件通常只覆盖中国合规。应由面向智利进口商建立SEC资料链，避免将CCC或GB/T报告当作SEC批准。
gap.zht: 差距在於SEC准入視為智利特定門檻，中國文件通常只覆蓋中國合規。應由面向智利進口商建立SEC資料鏈，避免將CCC或GB/GBT報告當作SEC批准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where SEC scope applies to the product model before commercialization in Chile.
mandatory_status.cn: CCC/GB documentation is mandatory or relevant on China-side manufacture, but not equivalent to SEC market clearance.

source.publisher: Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles (SEC), Government of Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat SEC participation and mark requirements as target-market obligations that cannot be fulfilled by Chinese domestic conformity documents alone.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将SEC认证与标识要求视为目标市场义务，不能以中国国内合规文件单独完成。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將SEC認證與標識要求視為目標市場義務，不能以中國國內合規文件單獨完成。
